Container.Name: free-games-claimer
Container.Overview:
A self-hosted scheduler that claims free games and rewards across multiple storefronts on its own. Logs in once via your browser session, then keeps watch — daily checks, captcha-aware pause-and-notify when a human is needed, in-app stats showing what got claimed, what's pending, and how your Microsoft Rewards points are trending.
Claimers — log in once, then auto-claim any free game that drops: Amazon Prime Gaming: Free games + GOG / MS Store / Xbox keys delivered via Prime Epic Games Store: Weekly free-game claim GOG: Homepage giveaways + catalog watch for tag-flagged free items Steam: Free-to-keep promotions only (not F2P or free weekends)
Point / coin collectors — daily-cadence reward grinding: Microsoft Rewards: Daily Bing searches + activity cards for points, with before/after balance tracking AliExpress: Daily check-in coins (opt-in; disabled by default; deprecated)
Watchers — notify-only; surface new free items so you can grab them yourself: Ubisoft Connect: Pings on new free-week promos (opt-in) Humble Bundle: Pings on new free items in the Humble store (opt-in) Fanatical: Pings on new free Steam-key giveaways (opt-in) Lenovo Gaming Key Drops: Tracks scheduled drops + fires push notifications 1h before / 5min before / at drop time so you can land the queue before keys run out (opt-in)
